I’m from Dhanbad, the city of Black Diamond, working professionally as an Astrologer aOnd Palmist
from last 11 years. Though it was not easy for me to understand my life path. After completing my
12th I was questioning myself, what I’m here to do in this life?, what’s my soul purpose? Which career
R
will be best for me? In search I came to know about Palmistry and Astrology, that through this science
I could find out my life path. Yes because of this Science, I got to know my past life and understood my
T
soul purpose in this life is to serve the society through Jyotish.
S
I feel no one should struggle or suffer in their life. Using this science we can know ourselves better,
our goods and bads within us, what karma we are carrying from past life and many more.
A
Sukshma Roop Dhari Siyahi Dikhava R
